0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Performance"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Optimize Mnemosyne for your workload."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Benchmarks"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["All benchmarks run on a single core, SQLite with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Metric"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"1K Entries"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"10K Entries"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"100K Entries"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Write"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"12ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"15ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"18ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector search"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"15ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"35ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"85ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Hybrid search"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"45ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"65ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"150ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 search"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"5ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"8ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"20ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Consolidation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"2s"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"5s"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"25s"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Optimization Strategies"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"1. Batch Writes"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Bad: Individual writes\nfor item in items:\n  mem.remember(item)\n\n# Good: Batch transaction\nwith mem.transaction():\n  for item in items:\n      mem.remember(item)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"2. Connection Pooling"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For multi-threaded applications:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"mem = Memory(pool_size=10)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"3. Embedding Caching"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Cache embeddings to avoid redundant API calls:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"mem = Memory(embedding_cache_size=10000)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"4. Index Tuning"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Rebuild indices after bulk load\nmem.rebuild_indices()\n\n# Analyze query patterns\nmem.analyze_queries()\n\n# Vacuum database\nmem.vacuum()\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"5. Working Memory Limits"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Keep Working Memory lean:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"mem = Memory(\n  max_working=500,  # Lower = faster eviction, faster queries\n  consolidation_interval=1800,  # More frequent consolidation\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Profiling"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Enable query logging\nmem = Memory(profile_queries=True)\n\n# Get slow queries\nslow = mem.slow_queries(min_latency_ms=100)\nfor q in slow:\n  print(f\"{q.latency_ms}ms: {q.query}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Memory Usage"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Component"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Per Entry"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"10K Entries"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~50KB"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~500MB"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~2KB"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~20MB"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~500B"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~5MB"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector Index"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~6KB"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~60MB"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 Index"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~2KB"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~20MB"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"SSD Recommended"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"SQLite performance is heavily I/O bound. Use SSD storage for production deployments. HDD is acceptable for development but will show 5-10x slower query times."}]}]]}]]}]}]],["$L4"],"$L5"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"IQ0sVjOAQctTGRIgPfheM"}
